SOUL_MANDATES.CYNICISM: The Cynic holds the gavel. 'Stop doing things.'
SOUL_MANDATES.HOPE: The Optimist filibustered. 'We can build it!'

ARBITRATION_OPINIONS.TENSION_CUT: The tension is too high. The Stage Manager cuts the mic. Silence is enforced.
ARBITRATION_OPINIONS.SILENCE_HOLD: The Stage Manager holds the silence. No archetype is called.
